Standalone chart HTML for agents

Visual HTML Gen UI

A hand-indexed collection of self-contained chart pages. Each file is a static .html reference an agent can open, inspect, and adapt without loading the whole library into context.

26domains
280chart pages
domains
charts
Finance 30 Office 10 Education 10 Health 10 Ecommerce 10 Social 10 Entertainment 10 Gaming 10 Content Creation 10 Enterprise Services 10 Cybersecurity 10 AI Agent 10 Real Estate 10 HR 10 Mobility 10 Travel 10 Biotech 10 Legal 10 Government 10 Manufacturing 10 Energy 10 Retail 10 Crypto 10 Fashion 10 Sports 10 Pets 10

Finance

30 charts

Capital markets, investment research, portfolio analytics, risk, and private-market operating metrics.

Line Chart
Show price, NAV, revenue, or macro trend changes over time.
linechart
finance/line-chart.html->
Area Chart
Emphasize accumulated scale such as AUM, deposits, or net inflows.
